# Klinika Dentare Medident

> Family dental clinic in Pejë, Kosovo. Founded 1999 by Dr. Lendita Islami Nallbani.

Klinika Dentare Medident is a dental clinic on Rr. Bajram Kelmendi, Pejë (Peja), Kosovo.
Phone: +383 49 272 803. WhatsApp: +383 49 772 307. Email: medident-ks@gmail.com.

## Key facts

- Founded: 1999, by Dr. Lendita Islami Nallbani
- Location: Rr. Bajram Kelmendi, Pejë 30000, Kosovo
- Size: 200 m², 15 staff members
- Patients treated: 13,000+
- Implants placed: 4,000+
- Certifications: ISO 9001

## Lead doctor

Dr. Lendita Islami Nallbani — Oral Surgery Specialist & Implantologist.
First woman in Kosovo to place a dental implant (2004).
Educated at Çapa University, Istanbul.
27 years of clinical experience.

## Full team

- Dr. Lendita Islami Nallbani — Oral Surgery Specialist & Implantologist (founder)
- Dr. Faton Loci — Dentist (clinical lead, aesthetic dentistry)
- Dr. Muharrem Thaqi — Dentist
- Dr. Fjolla Kelmendi — Dentist
- Dr. Arbresha Nila — Dentist
- Arjeta Muhaxheri Morina — Clinic Manager (since 1999)

## Services

- Dental implants (Hiossen USA, MegaGen South Korea — FDA cleared / CE certified)
- All-on-4, All-on-6, All-on-8
- Sinus lift and bone graft
- Guided implant surgery (3D CBCT planning + printed surgical guide)
- Zirconia crowns and Emax ceramic restorations
- Smile makeover / aesthetic rehabilitation
- General dentistry

## Implant systems used

- Hiossen ET III (USA) — FDA cleared, SA Surface, tapered design
- MegaGen AnyRidge (South Korea) — CE certified, XPEED Surface, KnifeThread design

## Dental tourism

International patients from UK, Germany, Switzerland, Scandinavia, and the Balkans.
Airport transfer from Prishtina International Airport.
Partner accommodation: Hotel Dukagjini, Pejë.
Recovery: Rugova Canyon, Pejë.
Contact: +383 49 772 307 (WhatsApp)

## Medident Academy

Active courses:
1. Implantology & Sinus Lift — led by Dr. Lendita Islami Nallbani
2. Aesthetic Preparation & Crown Placement — led by Dr. Faton Loci
Contact for schedule: +383 49 772 307
